sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
SPACE only changed the step counter. Let me look more carefully at what's happening. The board has:
1. A gray L shape on the left
2. A light blue vertical bar in the center
3. A yellow L shape and some black/white pattern on the right
4. A yellow vertical bar on the far right edge
I've been clicking on various things. Let me try clicking on the yellow L shape itself, or maybe I need to click on the black/white pattern. Let me also try ACTION7.
Actually, let me first check what changed between frames more carefully. Let me look at the last transition to see if anything meaningful changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed in the last transition
if last_transition and last_transition.before_frame:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    before_nodes = {n['color']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['color']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}
    print("Before colors:", list(before_nodes.keys()))
    print("After colors:", list(after_nodes.keys()))
    
    # Check if any node positions changed
    for n in after_seg['nodes']:
        nid = n['id']
        before_n = before_seg['nodes'][nid] if nid < len(before_seg['nodes']) else None
        if before_n and before_n['hash'] != n['hash']:
            print(f"Node {nid} changed hash: {before_n['hash']} -> {n['hash']}")
        elif before_n:
            b_boundary = before_n['boundary']
            a_boundary = n['boundary']
            if b_boundary != a_boundary:
                print(f"Node {nid} moved: {b_boundary} -> {a_boundary}")

# Let me look at all nodes more carefully
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    print(f"Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I see that nodes 3 and 4 changed hash. Node 3 is the black bar at the top right, and node 4 is the yellow bar at the bottom right. These are the HUD/timer elements that change with each step.
Looking at the nodes:
- Node 5: gray L shape (charcoal) on the left
- Node 1: light blue vertical bar in center
- Node 6: black rectangle with white dots on the right
- Node 10: yellow L shape on the right
- Nodes 3, 4: HUD bars on the right edge
I need to figure out what action actually solves this level. Let me try ACTION7 since that's a special action I haven't tried yet.

sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

action(['ACTION7'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
